headline: IBM (IBM) Partners With OpenAI To Bring AI Cyber Defense To Enterprises
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) announced a partnership with OpenAI to integrate advanced AI cyber defense into enterprise workflows. The company introduced new application security services that use frontier AI to support software vulnerability detection and validation. The updates focus on applying large-scale AI models directly within client security operations and development pipelines. For IBM, this move sits at the intersection of two core focus areas: AI and enterprise security, where clients are...

headline: IBM (IBM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of technology and consulting giant IBM (NYSE:IBM) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after JPMorgan's Brian Essex raised the stock's rating to Overweight from Neutral and lifted his target to $291 from $270 (~15% upside), noting software is only about 45% of revenue but generates roughly two-thirds of consolidated profit, a shift he believes justifies a higher multiple.

content.title: IBM (IBM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
content.summary: Shares of technology and consulting giant IBM (NYSE:IBM) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after JPMorgan's Brian Essex raised the stock's rating to Overweight from Neutral and lifted his target to $291 from $270 (~15% upside), noting software is only about 45% of revenue but generates roughly two-thirds of consolidated profit, a shift he believes justifies a higher multiple.
